title: IIM Raipur Research Associate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
organization: Indian Institute of Management Raipur (IIM Raipur)
short_info: The Indian Institute of Management Raipur (IIM Raipur) has officially announced the Research Associate – Good Governance Project (Chhattisgarh) Recruitment 2026 with 1 opening. The detailed notification was published on 29 April 2026 at the official website. Candidates who meet the age criteria of up to 40 years and hold a Master’s degree (MA/MSc/MSW) in relevant disciplines such as Public Policy, Social Sciences, Economics, Statistics, or related fields can now submit their online applications from 29 April 2026 to 29 May 2026. Direct links to download the notification and apply online are sh

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 40 years Relaxation: As per Government of India norms for reserved categories.

qualification.details: Master's degree (MA/MSc/MSW) with a minimum 60% marks in Public Policy / Social Sciences / Economics / Statistics / Development Studies / Social Work / Rural Development / Gender Studies/Management from a recognised university with a good academic record throughout. Minimum 1 year of relevant work experience preferred. Fresh post-graduates with exceptional academic records and relevant internship/project experience may also be considered. Proficiency in quantitative and qualitative data analysis (SPSS/STATA/R/NVivo). Experience in primary data collection, survey administration, field research. Strong writing skills, familiarity with social sector programs. Excellent communication in English and Hindi. Willingness to travel in Chhattisgarh.

salary_details.details: Rs. INR 30,000 - INR 40,000 Per Month (Negotiable based on qualifications and experience)

selection_process: Written test and/or personal interview of the shortlisted candidates only.
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIM Raipur Research Associate Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 29-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIM Raipur to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIM Raipur Research Associate position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Research Associate position is 29 May 2026. Ensure all details are accurate before the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this role?
faq.answer: A Master's degree (MA/MSc/MSW) with at least 60% marks in relevant fields like Public Policy, Social Sciences, Economics, or Management from a recognized university is required.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any work experience required for the Research Associate post?
faq.answer: Yes, a minimum of 1 year of relevant work experience in a research associate or equivalent role is preferred. However, fresh post-graduates with exceptional academic records may also be considered.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Research Associate position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for this position is 40 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per Government of India norms for reserved categories.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Research Associate role?
faq.answer: The salary offered is between INR 30,000 to INR 40,000 per month, which is negotiable based on the candidate's qualifications and experience.

faq.question: Q6. How will candidates be selected for the Research Associate position?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a written test and/or a personal interview for shortlisted candidates.

faq.question: Q7. Is there an application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned for the General/OBC categories. Please refer to the official notification for any other category details.

faq.question: Q8. What are the key skills required for this role?
faq.answer: Proficiency in quantitative and qualitative data analysis (SPSS/STATA/R/NVivo), experience in primary data collection, strong writing skills, and excellent communication in English and Hindi are essential.

faq.question: Q9. Is travel required for this position?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates must be willing to travel within Chhattisgarh for project-related work.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF and the online application link are available in the Important Links section of this article for your convenience.
